extract: The Fashion Case (Japanese: アクセサリーいれ Accessory Container) is a Key Item introduced in Generation IV. It allows the player to store Accessories and Backdrops. There are several different sections for these Accessories: Fluffs, Pebbles and Boulders, Scales, Feathers, Facial Hair, Natural, Flowers, Specs, Misc, and Contest prizes, among others. Additionally, there are seventeen obtainable Backdrops.
